query:
SELECT 
  w.manual_code,
  w.full_name,
  ae.event_type,
  TIME(ae.event_time) as time_only,
  ae.event_time,
  ae.is_automatic
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE w.manual_code IN ('R04', 'R05')
  AND DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-07'
ORDER BY w.manual_code, ae.event_time;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT 
  w.manual_code,
  w.full_name,
  ae.event_type,
  TIME(ae.event_time) as time_only,
  ae.event_time,
  ae.is_automatic
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE w.manual_code IN ('R04', 'R05')
  AND DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-07'
ORDER BY w.manual_code, ae.event_time;
